summary: Daily screening from discussion sources: Grok 4.5 launch undercuts pricing, Claude Code security alerts, GPT-5.6 token efficiency gains, user workflow hacks (Codex auto-ping, n8n stack), and benchmark updates (Senior SWE-Bench, Databricks). | Screening of official vendor sources reveals major agent platform releases: Anthropic Claude Code deep-dive, JetBrains Kotlin benchmark, Supabase OpenCode integration, Mistral Vibe agent, Google ADK Go 2.0, Vercel Agent, and funding rounds for Daytona and E2B. Infra primitives include AWS MCP OAuth and Fly.io MCP. No user workflow reports from social sources in this shard. | Multi-agent orchestration, sandbox security, and framework releases dominate this shard. Microsoft's Agent Framework (12k stars) and Composio (29k stars) lead mainstream product signals. Bernstein offers audit-grade orchestration for CLI agents. Security advisories (GitHub Innersource, MCP scanner, Docker sandboxing) and Cloudflare's agents releases signal infra evolution. Social/discussion gaps noted. | Packages shard: 77 items scanned. Top signals: OpenAI Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, Vercel agent-eval-playground, LangChain, Semantic Kernel releases. Infra primitives include memory layers (sup-mem, greprag, agenticow), eval frameworks (atomr-agents-eval, reaatech), and security scanning (drylake). No user_workflow field reports found in this shard.

candidates.title: Grok 4.5 undercuts coding agent pricing
candidates.why_it_matters: Grok 4.5 competes with Opus 4.8 at half cost; drives pricing race.

candidates.title: GPT-5.6 54% more token efficient on agentic coding
candidates.why_it_matters: OpenAI claims major efficiency boost; Codex limits reset twice.

candidates.title: China warns of Anthropic Claude Code backdoor / spyware code
candidates.why_it_matters: Official alert plus hidden timezone tracking in system prompt.

candidates.title: Senior SWE-Bench benchmark for agents as senior engineers
candidates.why_it_matters: Open-source benchmark assessing agents at senior-level tasks.

candidates.why_it_matters: Large-scale benchmark reveals real-world agent performance gaps.

candidates.why_it_matters: Managed MCP service for agent tool integrations.

candidates.title: Verification loop 4x'd DeepSeek's intelligence, matching Opus at 1/7 cost
candidates.why_it_matters: Technique dramatically improves DeepSeek agent performance cheaply.

candidates.title: Microsoft Copilot OS leak reveals agentic AI OS
candidates.why_it_matters: Leaked video shows Edge-based OS with AI-powered UI, no Start menu.

candidates.title: User built DM agent on self-hosted n8n + Gemini + DeepSeek for $2-3/month
candidates.why_it_matters: Concrete workflow: processed 100+ messages with low-cost stack.; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: Automatic hourly ping to keep Codex 5hr usage windows rolling
candidates.why_it_matters: User trick to avoid losing Codex session; practical workaround.; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.why_it_matters: User reports: agents fail runtime checks; blocks production use.; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.why_it_matters: New benchmark evaluating AI coding agents on real-world Kotlin tasks.
